'''chavaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeagonite|zeagonite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeagonite|zeagonite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chavaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chævæbæth|chævæbæth]] || [[word:chævæbæj|chævæbæj]] || [[word:chævæbæsh|chævæbæsh]] || [[word:chævæbæ|chævæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chavavabath|chavavabath]] || [[word:chavavabaj|chavavabaj]] || [[word:chavavabash|chavavabash]] || [[word:chavavaba|chavavaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chavabath|chavabath]] || [[word:chavabaj|chavabaj]] || [[word:chavabash|chavabash]] || [[word:chavaba|chavaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chavafbath|chavafbath]] || [[word:chavafbaj|chavafbaj]] || [[word:chavafbash|chavafbash]] || [[word:chavafbaf|chavafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chavabatha|chavabatha]] || [[word:chavabaja|chavabaja]] || [[word:chavabasha|chavabasha]] || [[word:chavabaka|chavabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chavabath|chavabath]] || [[word:chavabaj|chavabaj]] || [[word:chavabash|chavabash]] || [[word:chavaba|chavaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chavabathal|chavabathal]] || [[word:chavabajal|chavabajal]] || [[word:chavabashal|chavabashal]] || [[word:chavabakal|chavabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chavabathatha|chavabathatha]] || [[word:chavabajaja|chavabajaja]] || [[word:chavabashasha|chavabashasha]] || [[word:chavabaka|chavabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chavabathan|chavabathan]] || [[word:chavabajan|chavabajan]] || [[word:chavabashan|chavabashan]] || [[word:chavabakan|chavabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chavabathaoro|chavabathaoro]] || [[word:chavabajaoro|chavabajaoro]] || [[word:chavabashaoro|chavabashaoro]] || [[word:chavabakaoro|chavabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
